name: Welcome Sequence
description: When a new contact is created, creates a welcome call task for day 1 and a follow-up check-in task for day 7.
descriptionAr: عند إنشاء جهة اتصال جديدة، ينشئ مهمة اتصال ترحيبي في اليوم الأول ومهمة متابعة في اليوم السابع.

config.title: Welcome call: {{name}}
config.description: New contact added. Make initial welcome call to introduce Rasmalak services.

config.title: Week 1 check-in: {{name}}
config.description: Follow up one week after initial contact. Ask about needs and schedule demo if interested.
